emails.subject: Fwd Obligation Testing
emails.body: Fwd Obligation Testing Kate, were you able to test the Fwd Obligation Report? Mr. Luu is ready to push it in to production, but we wanted you to look at it and give it your ok first. Thanks, Brett Pate Enpower QA

emails.subject: Re: Fwd Obligation Testing
emails.body: Re: Fwd Obligation Testing Brett I'm so sorry for not sending you an e-mail last night! I did test the report and it looks just fine but I had so many things going on right up until I left that I forgot to tell YOU that it looked fine. Thanks for the reminder, and for your work on the report. Kate From: Brett Pate/ENRON@enronXgate on 03/29/2001 09:10 AM CST

emails.subject: RE: Fwd Obligation Testing
emails.body: RE: Fwd Obligation Testing Kate, no problem at all, I just wanted to give you and Cara a chance to look at it too. Thanks, Brett
